title: polygonum propinquum
intro: Polygonum propinquum, also known as Hoarypea or Yin-Chen, is a plant species belonging to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antidiabetic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Polygonum propinquum include lowering blood sugar levels, improving insulin sensitivity, and reducing inflammation, which can help alleviate symptoms of diabetes and other related conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or an infusion, and its aerial parts are also used in herbal preparations to make capsules or tinctures.
